steps.dialogue: We're almost done with this lesson. Let's review the concepts you've learned here. You explored what happens when fractions go past one whole and identified that fractions on a number line follow the same patterns.

You learned a system that you can use every time we use a number line - keeping the jumps the same size no matter where you are on the number line. When we understand these systems for solving problems, the problems themselves become easier to understand.
Thinking with the help of systems and patterns has helped you grow from working only with fractions between 0 and 1, to understanding fractions anywhere on the number line.
Next time, we'll explore more patterns with these fractions beyond one whole. You got this! Your hard work today is what will prepare you for what's next.
